blocks.text: Memecoin cycles move in minutes. SyNexus compresses hours of manual chart and wallet research into seconds — one paste, one Sentinel fusion, one verdict.
Aegis hunts rug and liquidity traps. Pulse reads momentum integrity. Titan shadows whale wallets. Cipher fuses weak cross-lane signals. Oracle Supreme is the strategic layer on Pro.
Free tier covers the core scan. SyNexusPro unlocks full Sentinel grid refresh, Oracle briefings, and reduced trading fees — for operators who live on-chain daily.
